evals.name: local-docker-deployment
evals.prompt: Deploy the trained model as a local Docker API. The model is at models/model_v1.joblib and we need a FastAPI endpoint for predictions.
evals.expected_output: Should create Dockerfile, docker-compose.yml, FastAPI app with /predict endpoint, health check, and verify the deployment.

assertions.text: Creates a Dockerfile with appropriate base image and dependencies
Creates a /predict endpoint that accepts input and returns predictions
Includes a health check endpoint (/health or /)
Loads the serialized model at startup
